sensing_url.description: URL of the local sensing-server's latest-snapshot endpoint.

model_path.description: Filesystem path to the model weights (safetensors or Hailo HEF). Resolved relative to /var/lib/cognitum/apps/pose-estimation/ when not absolute.

poll_ms.description: How often to poll the sensing-server in milliseconds.

min_confidence.description: Drop frames where the inferred pose confidence is below this threshold. pose_v1 has no confidence head, so every frame carries the model's published per-frame confidence (0.185 = validation PCK@50); the default is pinned to that value so a default install actually emits frames. Raising it above 0.185 suppresses ALL pose.frame events (the runtime warns when this happens).
